name: Niagara Golf Garage
about: Niagara Golf Garage offers fully automated, 100% self-serve indoor virtual golf simulators on-demand. The venue is powered by TrackMan technology and provides access to over 200 famous golf courses. It operates on an appointment-only basis with daily hours from 6am to 10pm. The facility features two simulator bays designed for year-round golfing, practice, and community events, catering to players of all skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Over 200 renowned golf courses available to play
Variety of game formats including stroke play and match play
Beginner-friendly with adjustable tee settings and practice ranges
Affordable hourly rates with up to 4 players per bay

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, golfers need to bring their own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes. Outside food and drinks are allowed, though the venue does not serve them.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: On average, 2 players can complete 18 holes in about 2 hours. Groups of 4 typically take around 4 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue does not specifically mention kid-friendly amenities, but beginners of all ages are welcome.
